title: Upgrade Template Progression
description: This datapack/resourcepack will remove normal crafting of Armor/Tools/Weapon and pushes the player to use the Smithing Table to "upgrade" there items, this also means you are pushed to explore places to find templates for all the upgrading needs.
body: This datapack/resourcepack will remove normal crafting of Armor/Tools/Weapon and pushes the player to use the Smithing Table to "upgrade" there items, this also means you are pushed to explore places to find templates for all the upgrading needs.
